response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The final song segment (03:33-04:30) phonetically matches the provided JSON lyrics. The merch presentation (00:00-03:33) was transcribed manually. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the reference lyrics for the song portion. Manual transcription was applied for the merch presentation as the reference was null for that section. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied tight timing to match the energetic and rapid pace of the merch presentation. Song lyrics are anchored to vocal phrases with precise start times to avoid cascading delays.

subtitles.english: Two!

subtitles.original: はい！ということでね！
subtitles.english: Alright! And with that!

subtitles.original: え、あ、あとトレンド1位も本当にありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Oh, and also, thank you so much for #1 on the trends!

subtitles.original: 今日無理かな～って思ってたんで、めっちゃ嬉しかったし
subtitles.english: I thought it might be impossible today, so I'm really happy!

subtitles.original: トレンド爆散！なんかすごいいっぱい入ってたみたいで
subtitles.english: Trending explosion! It looks like so many tags got in!

subtitles.original: 本当にありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you all so much!

subtitles.original: それでは、もうひとつ大事なお知らせです！
subtitles.english: Now then, I have one more important announcement!

subtitles.original: ドン！
subtitles.english: Ta-da!

subtitles.original: 博衣こより、誕生日記念グッズ2026が発売されます！イエーイ！
subtitles.english: Hakuya Koyori Birthday Celebration Goods 2026 are going on sale! Yay!

subtitles.original: 早速詳細を見ていきましょう！
subtitles.english: Let's check out the details right away!

subtitles.original: まず1つ目はこちら！もふこよにもなれる！？2wayブランケット！
subtitles.english: First up is this! The "Can also become Mofu-Koyo!?" 2-Way Blanket!

subtitles.original: お部屋でゲームを楽しんでいるこよりの描き下ろしイラストです！
subtitles.english: It features a new illustration of Koyori enjoying games in her room!

subtitles.original: イラストはもちろんももこママ！
subtitles.english: The illustration is, of course, by Momoko-mama!

subtitles.original: これ丸めるともふこよに早変わりして、持ち運びも楽ちんだし
subtitles.english: When rolled up, it quickly turns into Mofu-Koyo, making it easy to carry...

subtitles.original: そのまま飾っても可愛いですね！
subtitles.english: ...and it's cute even if you just display it as is!

subtitles.original: 続いてはこちら！
subtitles.english: Next up is this!

subtitles.original: ボイスキーホルダー～ゲーム実況編～！
subtitles.english: Voice Keychain ~Game Commentary Edition~!

subtitles.original: 待望のボイスキーホルダーが出ました！こよりの録り下ろしボイスが入っているもので
subtitles.english: The long-awaited voice keychain is here! It contains newly recorded voices of Koyori...

subtitles.original: 今回はライブに合わせてゲーム実況中っぽいセリフ、
subtitles.english: ...and this time, to match the live theme, it has lines like a game commentary...

subtitles.original: 絶叫が6種類入っております！セリフはこよが考えました！
subtitles.english: ...including 6 types of screams! I thought up the lines myself!

subtitles.original: イラストはなもり先生です！
subtitles.english: The illustration is by Namori-sensei!

subtitles.original: 続いてはこちら！
subtitles.english: Next is this!

subtitles.original: こより監督ぬいぐるみスマホスタンド！
subtitles.english: Koyori Director Plushie Smartphone Stand!

subtitles.original: あのこより監督がついにぬいぐるみになったよ！可愛い！
subtitles.english: That "Koyori Director" has finally become a plushie! So cute!

subtitles.original: そのまま飾るもよし、スマホスタンドにもなるので超便利です！
subtitles.english: You can display it, and it also works as a phone stand, so it's super handy!

subtitles.original: 絶対ゲットしてね！
subtitles.english: Be sure to get one!

subtitles.original: 最後はこちら！
subtitles.english: And finally, this!

subtitles.original: ゲーム機風カードホルダー！
subtitles.english: Game Console-style Card Holder!

subtitles.original: 特典のチェキ風ブロマイドとかホロカも入れられて持ち運べちゃうカードホルダーです！
subtitles.english: It's a card holder for carrying things like the bonus bromide or Holocards!

subtitles.original: 中に入っている台紙のイラストはこよちゃんが描きました！
subtitles.english: I drew the illustration on the backing card myself!

subtitles.original: ゲーム機風のデザインもレトロゲームっぽくて可愛くない！？
subtitles.english: Doesn't the game console design look cute and retro!?

subtitles.original: はい！そしてフルセット特典はこちらです！
subtitles.english: Alright! And here is the full set bonus!

subtitles.original: ももこママ描き下ろしのチェキ風ブロマイドがつきます！
subtitles.english: It comes with a cheki-style bromide drawn by Momoko-mama!

subtitles.original: 数量限定版は直筆サインと箔押し複製メッセージ入り、
subtitles.english: The limited edition has a handwritten signature and a foiled message...

subtitles.original: 通常版は箔押しの複製サインとメッセージ入りになってます！
subtitles.english: ...while the regular edition has a foiled signature and message!

subtitles.original: 販売開始が、このあと21時10分に
subtitles.english: Sales will start at 21:10, shortly after this...

subtitles.original: してあるので、皆さんあの、慌てないで！大丈夫です！
subtitles.english: ...so everyone, please don't panic! It's okay!

subtitles.original: 10分からなので！はい！あの、見ていってください！よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: It starts at 21:10! Yes! Please check it out! Thank you!

subtitles.original: さらに特典ASMRボイスもつきます！
subtitles.english: There's also a bonus ASMR voice!

subtitles.original: 毎年恒例の、君の誕生日を逆に祝っちゃうASMRボイス2026年版！
subtitles.english: The annual 2026 version of the ASMR voice where I celebrate your birthday instead!

subtitles.original: こちらですね、毎年みんな誕生日まで我慢して聞いて「わーい！」ってなってるの
subtitles.english: I'm so happy to see everyone wait until their birthday to listen to it and go "Yay!" every year.

subtitles.original: すごく嬉しく思ってます！ぜひゲットしてください！
subtitles.english: I'm really glad! Please be sure to get it!

subtitles.original: はい！ということでね！
subtitles.english: Alright! And with that!

subtitles.original: 怒涛のお知らせでしたが、
subtitles.english: That was a lot of announcements,

subtitles.original: 可愛いでしょ？
subtitles.english: but aren't they cute?

subtitles.original: みんなが可愛いって言ってくれてて、こよ嬉しいよ！
subtitles.english: I'm so happy that everyone is saying they're cute!

subtitles.original: 表情とかもちょっと変わったんですよ！にへ～！
subtitles.english: My expressions have changed a bit too! Hehe~!

subtitles.original: これが出来るようになりました！
subtitles.english: I can do this now!

subtitles.original: あとは、キリッ！
subtitles.english: And also, sharp!

subtitles.original: えーい！こんな表情も出来るようになりました！
subtitles.english: Hyah! I can make these faces now too!

subtitles.original: メン限をお楽しみに！
subtitles.english: Look forward to the members-only live!

subtitles.original: ということで今日は博衣こより生誕ライブ2026ゲームソングライブに見に来てくれて
subtitles.english: So, thank you all for coming to the Hakuya Koyori Birthday Live 2026 Game Song Live today!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: このあとですね、新曲のアニメMV公開と
subtitles.english: After this, the animated MV for my new song will be released...

subtitles.original: メン限ライブ、あれですね、アニメMV公開見て
subtitles.english: ...and then the members-only live. Watch the MV release first...

subtitles.original: で、10分からグッズ買って
subtitles.english: ...then buy the merch at 21:10...

subtitles.original: 15分からメン限ライブって感じでゆっくり順番に
subtitles.english: ...and then the members-only live at 21:15. You can take it one step at a time.

subtitles.original: 行けるようになっているので、慌てず、欠けず、なんだ
subtitles.english: It's set up so you can go in order, so don't rush, don't miss out...

subtitles.original: 押さずでよろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: ...and don't push! Thank you!

subtitles.original: ということで今日はちょっと遅れちゃったんだけど
subtitles.english: So, although we started a bit late today,

subtitles.original: この3Dお披露目生誕ライブも出来て、大好きなゲームソングいっぱい披露できて
subtitles.english: I'm glad we could do this 3D debut birthday live and perform so many of my favorite game songs!

subtitles.original: 嬉しかったよ！みんな本当に見に来てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: I'm so happy! Thank you all so much for coming to watch!

subtitles.original: また会おうね！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Let's meet again! Thank you!

subtitles.original: MV見てね～！
subtitles.english: Watch the MV, okay~!

subtitles.original: ぽつり灯り 管制塔
subtitles.english: A single point of light, the control tower

subtitles.original: 砂嵐の向こうへ
subtitles.english: Towards the other side of the sandstorm

subtitles.original: 祈るように綴った
subtitles.english: I wrote, as if in prayer,

subtitles.original: これからのこと
subtitles.english: Of the things yet to come

subtitles.original: ラジオネーム 匿名希望
subtitles.english: Radio name: Anonymous

subtitles.original: お便り 届いていますか
subtitles.english: Has my letter reached you?

subtitles.original: この世界がいつからか
subtitles.english: Since some time ago, this world...

subtitles.original: まるで他人事のように
subtitles.english: ...has felt like someone else's business

subtitles.original: やけに静かなので
subtitles.english: It's become so strangely quiet
